file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import {
  formatCurrencyBR,
  getFormattedPoints,
  getParsedCurrency,
  getParsePoints,
} from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction="row" mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={() => {
            const ptsSel = getParsePoints(pointsValue);
            const reaisSel = getParsedCurrency(reaisValue);
            handleContinue({ pointsSelected: ptsSel, reaisSelected: reaisSel });
          }}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;

content.text:
Excellent. The type errors found are NOT related to Redux migration or export statements—they're pre-existing issues in the component. Now let me create a comprehensive verification report.

## MIGRATION REVIEW: InvoiceCashbackPoints Export Statement

**VERIFICATION RESULT: PASS (3/3 Criteria Met)**

---

### 1. **mapStateToProps and mapDispatchToProps Removal: PASS**

**Status:** Correctly removed

**Evidence:**
- **index.tsx**: No imports or references to `mapStateToProps`, `mapDispatchToProps`, `bindActionCreators`, or `PointsActions`
- **Grep verification**: Zero occurrences across the entire directory
- **File locations:**
  - `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx` (lines 1-272)
  - `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx` (lines 1-163)

---

### 2. **connect() HOC Wrapper Removal: PASS**

**Status:** Correctly removed

**Evidence:**
- No `react-redux` imports anywhere in the screen
- No `connect()` wrapper around the component
- Component structure follows **Hook Component pattern** (index.tsx logic + view.tsx render):
  ```typescript
  // Line 20-270 in index.tsx: Logic component
  const InvoiceCashbackPoints: FC<InvoiceCashbackProps> = ({ route }) => {
    const { points, pointsQuantity, isLoadingParameterization, requestParameterization } = usePoints();
    // ... rest of logic
    return <InvoiceCashbackPointsView ... />;
  ```
